segments.text: Please note that this call is being recorded for quality and audit purposes. I hope you will give me truthful answers, because if your policy proposal is accepted, then it becomes a legal contract between you and Tata AIG Insurance. All the answers you give will be in your policy record. Due to false answers, the policy can be cancelled or revoked.
